transcript: Recite some of the scriptures. Today's lesson comes from Isaiah 41. Keep silence before me, o coastlands, and let the people renew their strength. Let them come near. Let them speak. Let us come near together for judgment. Who raised one from the East, who was in righteous who in righteousness called him to his feet? Who gave the nations before him and made him the ruler over kings? Who gave them as dust to his sword? As driven stubble to his throat? Who pursued them and passed safely by the way that he had not gone with his feet? Who has performed it and done it? Calling the generations from the beginning, I am the Lord, the first, and with the last, I am he. The coastland saw it and feared the ends of the earth were afraid. They drew near and came. Everyone helped his neighbor and said to his brother, be of good courage. So the craftsman encouraged the goldsmith. He who moves with the banner inspired him who strikes the anvil, then he fastened it with pegs that it might not totter. But you, Israel, my servant, Jacob, whom I have chosen, the descendants of Abraham, my friend, you whom I have taken from the ends of the earth and called from its farthest regions and said to you, you are my servant. I have chosen you and have not cast you away. Fear not, for I'm with you. Be not dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes. I will help you. I will uphold you with my righteous right hand.

Let us come near together for judgment.
Who raised one from the East,

and with the last, I am he. The coastland saw it and feared the ends of the earth were afraid. They drew near and came. Everyone helped his neighbor and said to his brother, be of good courage.

with the banner inspired him who strikes the anvil, then he fastened it with pegs that it might not totter.

But you, Israel, my servant, Jacob, whom I have chosen, the descendants of Abraham, my friend, you whom I have taken from the ends of the earth and called from its farthest regions and said to you, you are my servant. I have chosen you and have not cast you away.
Fear not, for I'm with you. Be not dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes. I will help you. I will uphold you with my righteous right hand.
